title: XR's Expanded Moss
description: This is a small MCreator mod that creates a new way to mossify blocks.
body:
This is a small MCreator mod that creates a new way to mossify blocks.

## This mod is no longer being updated. The Immersive Weathering mod has a similar feature here
[> Immersive Weathering <](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-weathering)

This mod adds a new item called the "Moss Heap" which can be crafted from a Moss Block.
The Moss Heap can be used to apply moss directly to placed Cobblestone and Stone Bricks. This mod also adds a new functionality to the Axe allowing it to scrape off moss from Mossy Blocks.

This mod has advancements as well, as an in-game way of explaining how to use the mod (just in-case you didn't read this).
